name: codeforge-design
description: codeforge ζ arc Design lane plugin — ArchitectPLAgent + ArchitectAgent (chief author, Opus multi-source synthesizer) + 5 permanent SubAgent (SecurityArch · InfraOperationalArch · TestContractArch · DataArch · CodeArch) + 3 CONDITIONAL SubAgent (LiveOps · LiveOrdering · ProductionEvidence) + 3 4-tuple sub-tuple component (CodebaseMapper · Refactor · ArchitectAnalyst — flat spawn, deputy 아님). Change Plan + ADR templates owned. Story §3 (code + data) / §7 (incl. §7.4 운영리스크) / §8 (incl. §8.5 stateful) / §11 데이터 마이그레이션 (incl. §11.6 idempotency primary) / §13 production evidence quad mirror self-write. codeforge core 의존. + CFP-1026 S3 (2026-05-20) — design lane agent 구조 재편 atomic activation: DataMigrationArchitect → DataArchitect rename + mandate 확장 (§3 data + §11 전체); OperationalRiskArchitect → InfraOperationalArchitect rename (§7.4 primary 6-sub, ProductionEvidence disjoint axis); CodeArchitect 신설 (Sonnet, §3 code single-mandate advocacy); ArchitectAnalyst 신설 (Sonnet, 4-tuple sub-tuple component, PriorArtAgent conceptual rename); ProductionEvidenceDeputy 신설 (CONDITIONAL production cutover, ADR-72). ADR-042 Amendment 7 + ADR-014 Amendment 4 + ADR-72 cross-repo sibling sync.
